generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance SteeringServoActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired steering angle commands into precise adjustments via vehicle servo actuators for adaptive cruise control functionality"
]

instance MotorActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts speed commands into motor voltage commands for propulsion system control in the autonomous vehicle"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Remote-triggered braking command system that halts the vehicle immediately via user control panel input"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D LiDAR sensor providing point cloud data for object detection and tracking in vehicle proximity (Hokuyo UST-10LX model)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Stereo depth camera capturing environmental perception data (Intel Deepsense D435i model)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensors monitoring real-time vehicle metrics including speed and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateMetrics
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction Data Streams
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateMetrics : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ROS2DataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARPointCloudData, DepthImageData, VehicleStateMetrics
    base:desc "ROS2-based middleware transmitting raw sensor data to Data Collection FE"
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance LiDARPointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering model processing LiDAR point clouds for object detection and segmentation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter model for object tracking and ego-vehicle state estimation from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Performance-class I ACC control logic adhering to ISO 15622 standards for adaptive cruise control decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracking data generated from LiDAR point clouds and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ego-vehicle state metrics (speed, steering angle) captured from onboard sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateMetrics
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimationEnabler
]

instance ProjectedPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D visualization of projected driving paths based on current vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance HistoricalDataStorage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing historical object tracks and vehicle state data for reporting and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DatabaseStorageEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based middleware facilitating inter-component communication between physical twin and digital twin entities"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, DataTranslationService
]

instance DBSCANProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering implementation for processing LiDAR point clouds into object clusters"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectDetectionService
]

instance KalmanFilterProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for object tracking and ego-vehicle state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Data Translation Feature Engine converting between sensor data formats and DT processing requirements"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCompatibilityService
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinEdgeProcessing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano edge processing for ACC computation offloading"
    DTDFVocab:enables EdgeComputationService
]

instance ROS2LifecycleManagement : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 lifecycle management for component state transitions and error handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemLifecycleService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkProcessing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink implementation for complex systems modeling (e.g., point cloud processing)"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationEnabler
]

instance DatabaseStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database implementation for storing historical data and reports"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPersistenceService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data collection of ego-vehicle state and environmental perception via ROS2 middleware"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance DataTranslationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Format alignment and unit conversion between sensor data and DT processing requirements"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataCompatibilityAction
]

instance ObjectDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Object detection and clustering from LiDAR point clouds using DBSCAN algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackingInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time ego-vehicle state estimation using Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performance-class I adaptive cruise control implementation adhering to ISO 15622 standards"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveSpeedControlAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization interface showing ego-vehicle state, object tracks, and projected paths"
    DTDFVocab:provides PathVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of human-readable reports from historical data and metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalReportAction
]

instance EdgeComputationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC computation to edge devices (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano) for scalability"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputationOffloadingAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control interface enabling ACC enable/disable, speed setting, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time visualization of vehicle speed, steering angle, and detected objects"
]

instance ObjectTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks and their trajectories in the vehicle's environment"
]

instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time metrics of ego-vehicle speed and steering angle for ACC decision-making"
]

instance AdaptiveSpeedControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of vehicle speed based on detected obstacles and road conditions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataCompatibilityAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Ensuring data format and unit consistency between sensor inputs and DT processing requirements"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PathVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of projected driving paths and current vehicle trajectory"
]

instance HistoricalReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of time-series reports for analysis of object detection and vehicle state metrics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ComputationOffloadingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Transferring ACC computation workload from vehicle ECUs to edge/cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC and manual intervention via user control panel"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction includes:
  - **ACC Control FE**: Computes desired speed based on detected lead vehicles and distance, then sends actuation commands to the vehicle’s motor and steering systems via ROS2.
  - **Emergency Braking Command**: Sent from the User Entity’s Control Panel to the Physical Twin Entity’s Actuation FE, triggering immediate braking to halt the vehicle.
  - **Remote Management Commands**: Enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, or send emergency braking commands via Wi-Fi (UDP-based) to the PT, ensuring low-latency (<100 ms) response for safety-critical operations.
  The system follows ISO 15622 for ACC compliance, with actuation executed on the vehicle’s ECUs (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano) via ROS2 nodes."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DTS operates on a **real-time time scale** with the following synchronization requirements:
  - **Data Collection and Processing**: Object tracking and ego-vehicle state updates occur at **high frequency** (implied by real-time perception cycles), with latency constraints enforced by the 3GPP V2V specification (≤100 ms end-to-end).
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Devices (PT and DT) are synchronized to an accuracy of **≤100 ms** to ensure event ordering and data integrity in distributed systems, though stricter standards (e.g., <1 ms) are mandated for safety-critical vehicular applications in other contexts.
  - **Service Latency**: Virtual-to-physical interactions (e.g., ACC commands) must respond within **≤100 ms** to meet ISO 15622 performance requirements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DTS constellation is structured as a **three-entity system** (ISO 23247 reference architecture), with the following components:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor data processing (Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking, Data Pre-Processing FE) and actuation (Actuation FE) on the vehicle’s hardware (NVIDIA Jetson).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection (Data Collecting FE), reporting (Reporting FE), and visualization (Presentation FE) via ROS2 nodes.
  - **User Entity**: Provides 3D Visualization (User Interface FE) and Control Panel (User Interface FE) for remote management and monitoring.
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Implements Data Translation FE for inter-entity communication (ROS2 for intra-entity, Wi-Fi for inter-entity via UDP).
  The architecture deviates from ISO 23247 by introducing a **Physical Twin Entity** (not defined in the standard) to encapsulate automotive-specific resources (sensors, actuators)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DTS spans the following lifecycle stages:
  1. **Design Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC development and validation, leveraging 3D CAD and ROS2 for simulation and testing.
  2. **Operational Phase**: Deployed for real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance of the autonomous vehicle’s ACC system during operation.
  3. **Data Collection Phase**: Captures operational data for post-mortem analysis, performance optimization, and decision-making (e.g., fuel economy, driving behavior). The DTS covers the **as-operated** representation phase of the physical twin, with minimal idealized design assumptions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
  - **Verification**: Ensured via ROS2’s lifecycle management and custom FE implementations (e.g., Kalman filter for object tracking).
  - **Validation**: Tested against ISO 15622 for ACC performance-class I compliance, with real-time latency (<100 ms) validated via 3GPP 22.185.
  - **Uncertainty**: LiDAR point cloud noise and sensor calibration errors are mitigated via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering.
  - **Data Integrity**: Clock synchronization (±100 ms) and Data Translation FE ensure consistent data streams between entities."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections include:
  - **Inter-Entity Communication**: Wi-Fi network for remote management between the User Entity and Physical Twin Entity.
  - **Intra-Entity Communication**: ROS2 network for data exchange within the Digital Twin system (e.g., Data Translation FE).
  - **Standardized Protocols**: Data serialization/alignment via ISO 23247 Data Translation FE (optionally using OPC UA per standard guidelines)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DTS is deployed as a **hybrid system**:
  - **Onboard Components**: ROS2 nodes on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (Physical Twin Entity) for real-time processing.
  - **Cloud/Edge Components**: Digital Twin Entity and User Entity hosted on external devices (e.g., cloud servers) for scalability and remote management.
  - **Data Storage**: SQL databases (implied) store historical data externally to the vehicle for reporting and analysis."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system does not integrate with external information systems beyond its primary functionality. The case study focuses on a single 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle, with no mention of fleet coordination or inter-vehicle communication (e.g., V2V)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DTS adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for Digital Twin Manufacturing (adapted for automotive DTs, with deviations like the Physical Twin Entity).
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control performance requirements (Sections 6.1–6.2 for performance-class I).
  - **3GPP 22.185**: Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication latency requirements (<100 ms).
  - **ROS2**: Robot Operating System 2 for middleware and inter-component communication."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations include:
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: The DT is classified as a **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop**, ensuring operator oversight during remote management.
  - **Latency Constraints**: End-to-end latency must be ≤100 ms to prevent unsafe delays in ACC control or emergency braking.
  - **Synchronization**: Clock accuracy of ≤100 ms ensures event ordering and data integrity in distributed systems.
  - **Cybersecurity**: Not addressed in the document; the focus is on safety/reliability (e.g., ISO 15622 compliance)."
]
